input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.3.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.3.1.1
            TITLE: supplying power to the motor to drive the vehicle in reverse is prohibited

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.3.1.1: Supplying power to the motor to drive the vehicle in reverse is prohibited
EV.3.1.1 Supplying power to the motor to drive the vehicle in reverse is prohibited

final_answer: Supplying power to the motor to drive the vehicle in reverse is prohibited
